paper_title: Sentiment Classification for Indonesian E-commerce Reviews: Baseline vs Transformer

baseline.name: TF-IDF + Logistic Regression with Character N-grams

transformer.fine_tuning: Weighted cross-entropy loss for imbalanced data

key_findings: Baseline model achieves high accuracy (94.36%) with minimal computational cost
Baseline provides better F1 scores than transformer on full test set
SVM outperforms Logistic Regression for sentiment classification
Weighted loss effectively addresses class imbalance in transformer
Trade-off between model complexity and inference speed documented
